titleStmt.title: SII 24.210: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 210. (A.R. No. 50 of 1936-37.) SAME WALL.

summary.p: Registers a sale of land including the land acquired by exchange (vide No. 209 ante) by Gōmaḍattu Nārāyaṇa-Bhaṭṭaṉ and his brother Vaiṉatēya Bhaṭṭaṉ to Araiyaṉ Periya-Perumāḷ alias Kāliṅgarāyar of Kaṭṭikkuṟuchchi, for the formation of a colony, (vide No. 211 below). The record bears the same date as the previous inscription (No. 209) viz., 10th year, Kuṁbha, ba. 13, Wednesday, Uttirāḍam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīḥ koccaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tirupuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīvīrapāṇḍyadevarkku yāṇṭu 10varuṣam pattāvatu kumpanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu trayodaśiyum putaṉ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirāṭattu nāḷ vaṭakarai rājarājavaḷanāṭṭup pāccil kūṟṟattu kiḻpalāṟṟu brahmadeyam perumāḷ Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷapperumāḷ tiruviṭai
yāṭṭam śrī vikramacoḻaccaruppetimaṅkalattu komaṭattu nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉum Eṉ tampi vayiṉateyapaṭṭaṉum Ivviruvom puñcey vilai pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭutta paricāvatu teṉkarai pāṇṭi maṇṭalattu miḻalaik kūṟṟattu naṭuvil kūṟṟil śrīparāntaka nallūr kaṭṭikkuṟucci Uṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ periya peru
māḷāṉa kāliṅkarāyarkku nāṅkaḷ Iṟṟai nāḷāl viṟṟukkuṭutta puñceykaḷāvaṉa Ivūr tiruvaraṅkavatikku kiḻakku vikkiramacoḻavāykkālukku teṟku mutaṟ kaṇ ṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirattum Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñcatirattum Eṅkaḷutāṉa puñceykaḷukku Icainta kiḻpāṟkellai vāykkālukkum I
nner Āṟṟukkup pokiṟa Oḻukkaikkum meṟkum teṉpārkkellai kaḷḷicayeRead kaḷḷicey viḷai nilattukkum vaṭakkum melpārkkellai tuppanāyakkar Akarattu matiḷukku nir viḻukkāṭu kāl kol viṭṭu kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai tirumeṟkoyil nāyaṉār tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāṉa tiruttu nilaṅkaḷukkut teṟkum Āka Iṉṉāṉke
llaikkuḷpaṭṭa kucavaṉ tiṭar puñcey kuḻi mikutik kuṟai vuḷpaṭa meltalai vāttu śeṣam Uḷppaṭa kuḻi muṉṉūṟṟu Ampatteṭṭum tirumeṟkoyil kāṇi Uṭaiya kāśyapaṉ malaikkiṉiyaniṉṟāṉ paṭṭaruṭaṉ parivattittu koṇṭa Iraṇṭāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟcatirattu nilam Araikkāṇik kiḻ mukkāle nālumā muntirikaiyiṉāl viriviṉpaṭi kuḻi nūṟṟiru
patum Itaṉ kiḻakku koṟukoṭṭi kecavapaṭṭarum kārampicceṭṭu varatarāca paṭṭarum Uḷḷiṭṭār pakkal koṇṭuṭaiyeṉāy Eṉṉutāṉa nilam Uḷpaṭa nilam Orumā muntirikaikkiḻ mukkāliṉāl viriviṉpaṭi kuḻi muṉṉūṟṟut toṇṇūṟṟu Iraṇṭum Ākak kuḻi Eṇṇūṟṟu Eḻupatu Ikkuḻi Eṇṇūṟṟeḻupatum Itil niṉṟa teṅku mā Uḷḷiṭṭa pala vṛkṣaṅkaḷum
Akappaṭa viṟṟukkuṭuttom Araiyaṉ perumāḷāṉa kāliṅkarāyarkku komaṭattu nārāyaṇa paṭṭarum vayinateya paṭṭarum Ivviruvom Ippaṭi viṟṟuk kuṭutta Ippuñcey kuḻi Eṇṇūṟṟu Eḻupattu Iti niṉṟa teṅku mā Uḷ(ḷa)ppa(ṭ)ṭa pala pala vṛkṣaṅkaḷum Uḷppaṭa Ivar perumāḷ tirunāmattāl vaikkiṟa Akaram (kaliya) kaliyukarāmaccaruppetimaṅkalam vaitta nāṅkaḷ viṟkaiyil Ippuñcey kuḻikkum teṅkuḷḷiṭṭa palavṛkṣaṅkaḷukkum Emmilicaiñca vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu
vaḻaṅkum varākaṉallirāci paṇam 6 100 10 3 Ippaṇam Aṟunūṟṟu Oru pattu muṉṟukkum Ippuñcey kuḻi Eṇṇūṟṟu Eḻupattum Ituṉiṉṟa teṅku Uḷḷiṭṭa phala vṛ kṣaṅkaḷum Akappaṭa viṟṟukkuṭuttom Araiyaṉ perumāḷāṉa kāliṅkarāyarkku Ik komaṭattu nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉum Ivaṉ tampi vayiṉateyapaṭṭarum Ivviruvom Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutta Ippuñcey kuḻi Eṇṇūṟṟu Eḻupattukkum Itiṉiṉṟa teṅkuḷḷiṭṭa palavṛkṣaṅkaḷukkum Ippaṇam Aṟuṉūṟṟu Oru patti
muṉṟume vilaiyāvatākavum Ituve poruḷmāvaṟutip poruṭ celavolai Āvatākavum Itu vallatu veṟu poruḷmāvaṟuti poruḷc celavolai kāṭṭak kaṭavatallavākavum Ippaṭi vilaikkuṟa viṟṟu poruḷaṟak kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta Ippuñcey kuḻi Eṇṇūṟṟu Orupatum Ituṉiṉṟa teṅku mā Uḷḷiṭṭa pala vṛkṣaṅkaḷum Ivaṟ(k)ku dāna dharmma vikrayaṅkaḷukkurit tāvatākavum Ippuñcey nilattukku Āgāmiyāṉa gobhūhi
raṇyādi dānaṅkaḷum bhāgamum bhāgāśrayaṅkaḷum Itiṉiṉṟa meṉokkiṉa maraṅkaḷum kiṇokkiṉa kiṇaṟu maṟṟu meṟpeṟpaṭṭa Urimaikaḷum Akappaṭa viṟṟukkuṭuttom Ivvaraiyaṉ periya perumāḷāṉa kāliṅkarāyarkku komaṭattu nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉum Eṉ tampi vayiṉateya paṭṭaṉum Ivviruvom Ippaṭi Ippaṇam Aṟuṉūṟṟu Orupattu muṉṟukkum Ikku riya toṭṭap puñcey Uḷpaṭa kuḻi Eṇṇūṟ ṟeḻupatum Itil
niṉṟa teṅku mā Uḷḷiṭṭa pala vṛkṣaṅkaḷum viṟṟuk kuṭuttamai �yaṇa paṭṭaṉeṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Ivaṉ tampi vainateyapaṭṭaṉeṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kuṟukoṭṭik kecavapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu § Ivarkaḷ Aruḷic ceyya Ipramāṇam Eḻutiṉamaiykku Ivvūrk kaṇakku ṉerkkuppaiy Uṭaiyāṉ ka ḷai Eḻuttu § Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ coṭṭaicciṅkappirāṉ paṭṭaṉeṉ §
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ cirāmapiriya yejñasiṅha bhaṭṭaṉeṉ § Ip devabhaṭṭaṉeṉ § Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ kārampicceṭṭu mātavapaṭṭaṉeṉ § Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ pattaṅki tiruvaraṅkamāḷipaṭṭaṉeṉ § Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Irāyūr pūḷiṉ kuṟippu śrīvāsutevapaṭṭaṉeṉ § Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ piṟāṉtūr ciraṅkanātapaṭṭaṉeṉ § Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ kāśyapaṉ ṉ paṭṭa ṉeṉ .
Digital edition of SII 24.210 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
